reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle with authored discrete tilt states and drive frame selection from torque buckets instead of live rotating one image.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_scale_platform_dual_520x96.png through AssetServer and bind frame indices to the seven target angle buckets.
runtime_notes: Frames cover minus 45, minus 30, minus 15, 0, plus 15, plus 30, and plus 45 degrees.
Center axle art stays aligned to the world pivot so physics and art stay in sync.
Objects on the platform use Rapier colliders while art remains a non physics child sprite.

context.usage: Main balance puzzle platform that shifts angle based on torque from Umbra, Echo helpers, and numbered weight blocks.

shape.silhouette: Wide two arm scale with a central axle, stepped art deco braces, and marked end caps for load placement.

specs.texture: Brushed gold trim over dark metal braces with a clear white axle highlight.
specs.shading: High contrast edge shading that preserves platform thickness across all seven tilt states.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 3640x96 px with seven 520x96 frames.
Frame 4 is level and frames 1 and 7 show the full minus 45 and plus 45 degree endpoints.
The axle center remains on one pixel coordinate across all frames so world pivot alignment stays exact.
